description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.10 Docker image and a global before_script that creates /go/src/gitlab.com/sebidude and /go/src/_/builds directories, copies the project into /go/src/gitlab.com/sebidude/public-page, and symlinks /go/src/gitlab.com/sebidude to /go/src/_/builds/sebidude. Define two stages: build and publish. In the build stage add a linux-app job that runs make build, stores the build/ directory as an artifact that expires after 10 minutes. In the publish stage add a pages job that depends on linux-app, runs make update-releasepage then ls -laR public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that also expires after 10 minutes.
